lines: Jim is sitting pretty at the top after Spain absolutely battered Wilmot's Saudi Arabia 4-0 last night — yes Wilmot, your boys got their arses handed to them by the very team sharing your group, you absolute mug.

Ellis is having a proper nightmare — New Zealand just got spanked 3-1 by Egypt, leaving her Kiwis bottom of Group G with one point, while Argentina better pull their fucking finger out today or she'll have nothing left to cling to.

Today's Group I double-header is a sweepstake clusterfuck of the highest order — France vs Iraq involves four of you cunts (Callum, Croft, Dene, The Foreman), and Norway vs Senegal has five stake-holders, meaning someone's getting points and someone's getting absolutely nothing, as usual Dene.

Dene is currently propping up the entire sweepstake on 4 points with France, Senegal, Bosnia and Tunisia — three of those teams have a combined zero wins so far, and the fourth is France, who frankly owe him a massive fucking favour today.

Keep your eyes on Argentina vs Austria today — Ellis desperately needs Messi and the lads to win because if Austria nick it, her whole Group J situation turns to absolute dogshite faster than you can say 'should've picked a better team, love'.
